description: §23.6 E-FOREIGN-LANG-DUPLICATE — a library file declares TWO top-level `<foreign lang=…>` blocks (`lang="ts"` then `lang="js"`). A file has ONE foreign-language context (like ONE `<db src>`, §44.7.1); the checker fires on each block past the first, so the second `<foreign lang="js" />` fires E-FOREIGN-LANG-DUPLICATE (type-system.ts checkForeignLangLibraryDecl).
